name: greetings-research
description: Research greetings in a specified city and generate a markdown file.

assertions.message: A target city must be specified.

phases.name: research
phases.prompt: Determine how people in the city '{{inputs.city}}' say hi or greet each other. Write a structured markdown file named '{{inputs.filename}}' in the current working directory containing your research. Ensure the file contains at least 3 distinct greetings/slang expressions, their meaning, and usage context. Verify the file exists and is written correctly.
